admin.stacks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
banner.tagline: Join an exclusive network of elite engineers. Engage in high-fidelity academic mentorship and rigorous code reviews designed to push the boundaries of your technical expertise.
banner.quote: Great code isn't just about syntax; it's about the clarity of thought behind it.
landing.hero.title: Where Code Meets Academic Rigor
landing.hero.subtitle: Engage in deep, 1-on-1 code reviews and academic mentorship with staff engineers from top tech organizations.
landing.pillars.title: Built for Rigorous Development
landing.pillars.subtitle: Our methodology blends traditional academic thoroughness with elite engineering standards.
landing.pillars.discourse.title: Academic Discourse
landing.pillars.discourse.desc: Go beyond linting. Discuss system architecture, memory efficiency, design patterns, and complexity tradeoffs.
landing.pillars.audits.title: Expert Audits
landing.pillars.audits.desc: Get thorough, line-by-line feedback on your merge requests from engineers who build web-scale infrastructure.
landing.pillars.scheduling.title: Focused Sessions
landing.pillars.scheduling.desc: Book direct, 45-minute synchronous video/audio sessions for pair programming or architecture whiteboarding.
landing.codeSim.comment: Excellent structural division here. However, using a concurrent hash map for connection pooling would prevent race conditions under load.
landing.stacks.title: Master Your Technology Stack
landing.stacks.subtitle: Whether you are optimizing low-level systems or building distributed web apps, find domain specialists.
landing.howItWorks.title: The Mentorship Journey
landing.howItWorks.subtitle: Four steps to engineering excellence.
landing.howItWorks.step1.title: Choose Your Track
landing.howItWorks.step1.desc: Filter mentors by specialized stack, hourly rate, rating, or calendar availability.
landing.howItWorks.step2.title: Schedule a Session
landing.howItWorks.step2.desc: Select a 45-minute window that fits your schedule and describe what you want to cover.
landing.howItWorks.step3.title: Engage in Discourse
landing.howItWorks.step3.desc: Review code line-by-line, trace system bugs, or plan complex database migrations.
landing.howItWorks.step4.title: Review Actionable Feedback
landing.howItWorks.step4.desc: Access detailed evaluation notes, recommended materials, and automated session topic audits.
landing.testimonials.title: What Scholars Say
landing.testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from students, developers, and tech leads who transformed their craft.
landing.testimonials.user1.quote: The code review session on SkillSync saved me weeks of architectural refactoring. The feedback was incredibly thorough, academic in depth, yet immediately practical.
landing.testimonials.user1.author: Alex Mercer
landing.testimonials.user2.quote: Mentoring on SkillSync is highly rewarding. The students are motivated, the platform supports seamless scheduling, and the focus is on true mastery, not shortcuts.
landing.testimonials.user2.author: Sarah Jenkins
landing.terminal.title: Platform CLI Utilities
